title: Mod Info Command
description: A Fabric mod that adds a simple mod information command
body:
Mod Info Command is a Fabric mod that adds a simple utility command.  
The `/mod` command allows you to get the mod list and information about the mods installed on the server.  

 
Command syntax:  
`/mod list` - lists installed mods. Click any mod on the list to get the info quickly.  
`/mod info <mod>` - prints information about the mod with a given id.
